args.code: (async () => { try { const resp = await fetch('https://api.github.com/user', { credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' } }); const data = await resp.json(); return {status: resp.status, login: data.login, id: data.id, message: data.message}; } catch(e) { return {error: e.message}; } })()
